name: Update Agent
description: Update an agent's configuration and/or state. Both `config` and `state.config` are shallow-merged into the existing values — partial updates preserve siblings. Updating just `state.config.model` keeps tools, caps, outputs, and systemPrompt intact. Framework-managed fields (status, tasks, inbox, timeline) are never affected. Use this to tweak agent settings without recreating.

config.description: Framework config fields to merge. Top-level keys override existing; unspecified keys are preserved.

state.description: State fields to merge. For state.config, deep-merged so partial updates (e.g. just model) don't wipe sibling fields.
